titleStmt.title: SII 5.1002: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1002. (A.R. No. 137 of 1896). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kulottuṅkade varkku yāṇṭu
Āṟāvatu kaḷattūṟkoṭṭattu taniyūr śrīma turān=ta kacaturvve
timaṅkalattu madhyasta n ponvaṇṇana Āṭavallāne
num kampan campuvinenum Ivviruvom Ivvūr tiru
veṇkāṭuuṭaiyamahāde var paṇṭārattu nāṅka
ḷ koṇṭa kācu Irupatu Ikkācu Irupatuṅ kuṭukka māṭṭāmai
yyila Āṭavalāṉ poṉvaṇṇan Āṉa maturān=ta kamuven=ta veḷāṉ pa
kkale Irupatu kācuṅ koṇṭu Ide var paṇṭārattu nāṅkaḷ miḷa O
ṭukkiṉamaiyil Ivvirupatu kācināl van=ta policaikku Eṅkaḷ Iṟaiyili
nilam Ivvūr talaippāṭaka muḷḷiyil viracoḻavākkālukku te
ṟku mūnṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu maturān=ta kavatikku kiḻakku Aiñcāñ catirattu vaṭak
kileṭṭil melainālil meṭukuḻi nikki kiḻakkaṭaiya Iraṇṭu pāṭakamum
Ikkācināl van=ta policaikkāka Ide varkku Āṭavalān ponvaṇṇanā
na maturān=ta kamuven=ta veḷān ceyvitta tirunan=ta vaṉam civālaiya sa
ndoṣa nukku tirunan=ta vaṉappuṟamāka sa mmatittu viṭṭukkuṭuttom
Ivviruvom Ivai poṉvaṇṇan Āṭavalān Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.1002 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
